events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessed the lookahead schedule: activities A–E are complete (all finish by day 23). Of the remaining work, F (Electrical rough) and G (Plumbing top-out) depend only on completed E, so they're workable now. H (HVAC rough) is the held activity itself, and I (Rough inspection) needs F, G, *and* H — so I and everything downstream (J through Q) are transitively blocked by the indefinite hold. Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json` with `workable: ["F", "G"]`.
